title: Piquant Briny Italian Feta Cheese Carbonara
description: A quick and flavorful Italian dish featuring cubed feta cheese, this carbonara is a satvik-friendly twist on the classic recipe, with a briny and chewy texture from the feta and a savory taste from the steam-cooked ingredients.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the spaghetti according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and add the minced garlic, cooking for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, salt, and black pepper until well combined.
Add the cubed feta cheese to the bowl with the eggs and stir until the cheese is well coated with the egg mixture.
Add the cooked spaghetti to the bowl with the egg and feta mixture, tossing to combine.
Add the cooked garlic and olive oil from the skillet to the bowl with the spaghetti and egg mixture, tossing to combine.
Stir in the chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
Steam the dish for 2-3 minutes to combine the flavors and heat the ingredients through.
